context: Post-Parkinson@Home hard stop and remaining-blocker audit

recommendation.single_next_non_redundant_action: Submit the PPMI / Verily Study Watch qualified-researcher DUA application.
rationale: PPMI / Verily is the top-ranked gated external route in the external access readiness audit.
It is wrist-native and linked to MDS-UPDRS Part III labels, making it the highest-value remaining route to new labeled data.
All local WearGait-only and currently public external modeling routes are closed, failed, document-only, or hard-stopped for the active ceiling-break objective.
No scaffold, preregistration, download, or remote job is justified until access and row-level schema are confirmed.

fallback_if_ppmi_already_pending.action: Submit the WATCH-PD C-Path 3DT or Steering Committee access request.

negative_guidance: Do not launch another WearGait-only T1/T3 model family without new data or a pre-registered new target representation.
Do not rerun dead screens or the Parkinson@Home iter53 policy under the same preregistration.
Do not synthesize clean cache manifests without raw-data restoration.

tool_friction.claude: available but failed due low credit
